entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) generally considered to be self-pollinated

entities.name: NATURAL HYBRIDS
entities.description: Offspring resulting from spontaneous outcrossing in groundnuts

entities.name: OUTCROSSING
entities.description: The process of pollination between genetically different individuals leading to hybrid formation

entities.name: ROBUT 33-1
entities.description: A specific cultivar of groundnut where natural hybrids were observed

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of identifying and choosing stable lines from segregating generations

entities.name: SEGREGATING GENERATIONS
entities.description: Generations of hybrids where genetic traits segregate

entities.name: STABLE LINES
entities.description: Lines identified from segregating generations that maintain consistent traits

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to produce a high yield

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external conditions under which crop yield potentials are tested

entities.name: VARIABILITY
entities.description: Genetic diversity generated through the use of natural hybrids

relationships.description: Causes the formation of natural hybrids
Cultivar in which natural hybrids were observed
